name: ShellServiceObjectDelayLoad — Explorer Delayed Load
categoryDescription: Registry keys that cause code to execute at boot, logon, or via Windows subsystem hooks.
description: COM objects loaded by Explorer after the shell is initialized — a delayed variant of SharedTaskScheduler.
forensic_value: Same persistence mechanism as SharedTaskScheduler but loads slightly later in the boot sequence. Unexpected CLSIDs here indicate shell-level code injection.
